arts.ttl: Chelsea flop sent brutal messages after being spotted at Arsenal: "He can stay there!"
arts.sum: Chelsea winger Mykhailo Mudryk was in attendance at the Emirates as Arsenal beat his former club Shakhtar Donetsk 1-0 in the Champions League thanks to a Dmytro Riznyk own goal

arts.ttl: How Liverpool forward can earn "his ticket into the side" following Diogo Jota injury against Chelsea
arts.sum: Liverpool expert David Lynch believes that Darwin Nunez must show consistency when pressing and linking play if he is to cement a place in Arne Slot's starting XI.

arts.ttl: Report: What Chelsea are so convinced about amid contract stand-off with Josh Acheampong
Pulisic scores an OLIMPICO as AC Milan star sends Chelsea a message
arts.sum: Despite the presence of superstars such as Rafael Leao, Theo Hernandez and Mike Maignan, there is no doubt that since joining Milan from Chelsea in the summer of 2023, Pulisic has been Milan’s most effective, consistent and reliable player. Indeed, since the beginning of 2024, Pulisic has more goal contributions (15 goals, nine assists) in all competitions than any other Serie A player.

arts.ttl: 'Mudryk is a Ferrari Chelsea don't know how to drive'
arts.sum: 'Mudryk's a Ferrari you don’t know how to drive!' - Chelsea told by Shakhtar Mykhailo Mudryk is being wasted at Chelsea, according to Shakhtar Donetsk director Sergiy Palkin, who compared the winger to a Ferrari.

arts.ttl: Chelsea think they’ve found the next Didier Drogba – and he could cost just €25m
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly very keen on a potential transfer move for Getafe striker Christantus Uche, whom they view as being the next Didier Drogba. It seems the Blues are keen to move for the talented 21-year-old forward this winter, though his value has shot up in his brief time in Spain, and he’d now likely […] The post Chelsea think they’ve found the next Didier Drogba – and he could cost just €25m appeared first on CaughtOffside.
